name: notion
description: Read and write Notion pages — list, read, create, append

tools.name: notion_list
tools.description: List all Notion pages in workspace
tools.planner_hint: Use to list all pages accessible in the Notion workspace. No arguments needed.

tools.name: notion_read
tools.description: Read a Notion page by ID
tools.planner_hint: Use to read the content of a Notion page. Format: page_id=XXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXX

tools.name: notion_create
tools.planner_hint: Use to create a new Notion page inside a parent page or database. Format: parent_id=XXXX title=Page Title content=Optional body text

tools.name: notion_append
tools.description: Append text to an existing Notion page
tools.planner_hint: Use to add text to an existing Notion page. Format: page_id=XXXX content=text to append
